Answer: I cannot verify your KYC status from this information. The knowledge base says Aadhaar is an accepted KYC document, and KYC may be completed through Video KYC or Aadhaar-based e-KYC (OTP verification) for eligible customers.

response:
I can’t verify your KYC status here.

Aadhaar is an accepted KYC document, and Horizon Bank may offer Video KYC or Aadhaar-based e-KYC for eligible customers. For actual KYC verification/status, please use official channels:
- Horizon Mobile app
- nearest branch
- 1800-XXX-XXXX (Toll-free, 24x7)

For your safety, please don’t share Aadhaar numbers, OTPs, PINs, or passwords in chat.
